changeSet.author: openelis-tb
changeSet.comment: Reorder TB workflow pages: move storage from page 3 to page 6 and rename to Isolate Storage

update.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 5
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 6

column.name: instructions
column.value: Assign TB isolates to appropriate storage locations. Record storage location details and conditions for culture-positive samples.

column.name: content
column.value: Isolate Storage - Assign isolates to storage locations

update.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3 AND title = 'Sample Storage Assignment'

column.name: instructions
column.value: Assign samples to appropriate storage locations. Record storage location details and conditions.

column.name: content
column.value: Sample Storage Assignment - Assign samples to storage locations

update.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 6 AND title = 'Isolate Storage'
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 5
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4
notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3

changeSet.author: openelis-tb
changeSet.comment: Update workflow page template for storage page to reflect new name and order

column.name: description
column.value: Assign TB isolates to appropriate storage locations

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Assign TB isolates to appropriate storage locations. Record storage location details and conditions for culture-positive samples.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Isolate Storage - Assign isolates to storage locations

column.name: description
column.value: Assign TB samples to appropriate storage locations

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Assign samples to appropriate storage locations. Record storage location details and conditions.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Sample Storage Assignment - Assign samples to storage locations
